title: Yves De Billoëz
text: Home * People * Yves De Billoëz Yves De Billoëz [1] Yves De Billoëz , a Belgian ICT architect, manager and consultant with expertise in computer security , cryptography and banking operations [2] . He is CTO and Co-Founder of eSureCoin.com , Democratic Republic of the Congo , providing banks and financial institutions the ability to offer Bitcoin purchase and sale services [3] . As avocational computer chess programmer, Yves De Billoëz is author of the open source engine Belofte .
